# CHAT / NOTES CONSOLIDATION REQUEST (SOL)

## Scope
- date range / run ID range:
- what to include:
- what to exclude:

## Artifacts referenced
List all run IDs + filenames mentioned:
- …

## Output targets
- RN/RD note (yes/no)
- master-log insert (yes/no)
- manifest update suggestions (yes/no)
- next-chat primer (yes/no)

## Required standards
- use tags: [EVIDENCE] [INTERPRETATION] [HYPOTHESIS] [SPECULATION/POETIC]
- [UNKNOWN] for missing
- proof packets for promoted claims
